description: Shared-asset single-source manifest between Alembic (main) and AlembicPlugin (sibling). Consumed by scripts/check-shared-asset-drift.mjs. Edit-in-authority-then-sync; see AGENTS.md '共享资产单源与漂移门禁'.

assets.authority: shared sections: main; host sections: each host
assets.notes: Frontmatter description, envelope-vs-structuredContent prerequisite, alembic_knowledge_lifecycle references are intentional host divergence (tool contract; alembic_enrich_candidates was deleted in the Train B DCR wave). Gate compares wakeflow-shared sections only.

assets.authority: shared sections: main; host sections: each host
assets.notes: Main MCP exposes alembic_guard; plugin exposes alembic_code_guard with files/code/workRef scopes (RC0-verified). Tool-contract sections must never be merged.

assets.authority: shared sections: main; host sections: each host
assets.notes: DH-4b per-host: intro-and-overview / use-context-tail carry host-divergent tool surfaces (main/codex alembic_knowledge / confirm_usage ↔ plugin/cc alembic_search(operation=search|get|expand)); declared per-host so cross-host coherence skips them while title / find-recipes-tail / use-context-head stay coherence-checked. Plugin-only alembic_prime / alembic_codex_* guidance stays as plugin host overlay between shared regions.

assets.authority: shared sections: main; host sections: each host
assets.notes: DH-4b per-host: both shared sections are host-divergent tool surfaces (main/codex alembic_structure(targets|files|metadata) + knowledge-graph ↔ plugin/cc alembic_project_matrix + project-graph); declared per-host so cross-host coherence skips them (each side is its own per-host authority). Plugin-only source-graph guidance (alembic_source_graph_status / alembic_code_explore / alembic_symbol_search) stays as plugin host overlay between shared regions.
Intentional scope gap: plugin skill registry hardcodes the other 4 skills (AlembicPlugin lib/.../ProjectSkillService.ts). Gate fails if an undeclared copy appears on the plugin side.
Plugin has no instructions injection registry; main-only by design.
Compatibility policy document for operation-level safeguards. Runtime roles and permission matrices are retired; Plugin must not carry host-specific role variants.
Plugin-as-guest design: the host injects provider config, so the top-level ai block exists only in main. Everything else must deep-equal.

README.md.mainLine: | `alembic_search` | mode 路由搜索（mode=auto: FieldWeighted + 语义融合，mode=context: 智能上下文检索） |
README.md.pluginLine: | `alembic_search` | compact search/get/expand 路由（operation=search/get/expand；mode=auto/keyword/semantic 用于检索策略） |

README.md.mainLine: | `alembic_knowledge(operation=confirm_usage)` | 确认 Recipe 被采纳/应用 |
README.md.pluginLine: | Dashboard Candidates | 用户 review/publish 候选知识的默认界面 |

README.md.mainLine: | `alembic_knowledge(operation=insights)` | 获取 Recipe 质量洞察（只读） |
README.md.pluginLine: | `alembic_project_matrix` / `alembic_graph` | 项目导航和项目内部关系上下文 |

assets.notes: README + _template.md per-host: _template.md heading variant (RC5 p1) plus three README tool-table rows that are host-divergent tool surfaces (main/codex alembic_search mode-routing + alembic_knowledge(confirm_usage|insights) ↔ plugin/cc compact alembic_search operation routing + Dashboard Candidates + alembic_project_matrix/alembic_graph). All other files must match exactly.
